refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall provide detailed worksite area analysis including terrain mapping, obstacle identification, and work-zone representation to support planning and execution.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is decomposed to explicitly address the key components of worksite mapping: terrain, obstacles, and work-zone representation, which are distinct functional aspects necessary for comprehensive site modeling.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by generating a worksite model/map that includes terrain features, identified obstacles, and clearly defined work zones, validated against ground truth data or site surveys.
sub_frs: FR1: Provide terrain mapping of the worksite area.
FR2: Identify and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent work-zone boundaries and relevant site features.

candidate_dps: DP1: Use LIDAR and sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle data acquisition.
DP2: Implement a geospatial data processing algorithm to generate digital terrain models and obstacle maps.
DP3: Develop a work-zone modeling framework integrating site policies and operational constraints.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Use LIDAR and sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle data acquisition.

potential_sources: Data dependencies between terrain and obstacle mapping algorithms.
Integration of work-zone representation with obstacle data.
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically supports the FR with manageable coupling; sensor fusion enables integrated data acquisition minimizing cross-domain dependencies.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability and reliability of LIDAR and sensor data in all worksite conditions.
Risk of incomplete obstacle detection due to sensor limitations or environmental factors.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing data processing algorithms to reduce coupling and improve maintainability.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: System-level module responsible for integrating sensor data, processing worksite models, and providing outputs to planning and execution functions.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data including LIDAR and other environmental sensors.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Provides processed worksite models and maps to planning and execution modules.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange with remote modules and external systems for updates and coordination.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as the module centralizes worksite mapping functions; low diffusion indicating minimal duplication.
Limited containment; vehicle module primarily focused on mobility and control, not mapping.
Minimal containment; teleoperation focuses on remote control, not data processing.
Negligible containment; safety services consume mapping data but do not generate it.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite mapping in the NGHE Solution module reduces diffusion and improves data integrity and maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential performance bottlenecks if all sensor data processing is centralized.
Risk of module becoming too large and complex, impacting maintainability.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate partitioning within NGHE Solution for scalability; consider submodules if complexity grows.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR with clear mapping from terrain and obstacle analysis to sensor fusion techniques.

diffusion_risks: Low risk of diffusion as worksite mapping is centralized in NGHE Solution module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment is strong with NGHE Solution owning the mapping functionality, minimizing cross-module dependencies.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing the NGHE Solution module's ability to generate accurate worksite models and maps.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FR to NGHE Solution module with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Monitor module complexity within NGHE Solution to avoid maintainability issues.
Consider defining submodules if future decomposition is needed.

decision.justification: The current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meet the requirements with acceptable risk and clear ownership. No further decomposition is necessary at this stage.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Provide terrain mapping of the worksite area.
FR2: Identify and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent work-zone boundaries and relevant site features.

revise.why: Current artifacts are consistent and meet criteria; no revision needed.

assumptions: Sensor data availability and quality are sufficient for mapping.
NGHE Solution module has capacity to handle processing load.
open_risks: Potential sensor limitations affecting obstacle detection accuracy.
evidence_needed: Performance benchmarks of sensor fusion algorithms.
Verification test results of generated worksite models.
